findings.description: Required attributes `label` and `name` from the listSearchSortSubmit tag attribute table are missing from hints. Per V4, property names from table first columns should be included. Both are marked as required (必須) in the source table.
findings.source_evidence: Source table first column includes: label(必須) — 並び替えを行うサブミットに使用するラベル; name(必須) — 並び替えを行うサブミットに使用するタグのname属性（画面内で一意にすること）
